title: Swiggy Kth Largest Restaurant Rating
description: Swiggy ke discovery page pe top restaurants list karte time PM ko `k`th largest rating chahiye taaki spotlight banner decide ho. Tujhe `ratings` array (integers, ratings *100 stored) aur `k` diya hai. `k`th largest rating return kar (sorted-descending order me k-th element, 1-indexed; duplicates count alag-alag).
hints: Min-heap of size k maintain kar — top hamesha kth largest hota hai.
Har element push, heap size > k hone par pop kar de.
End me heap.peek() = answer.

title: Razorpay Last Settlement Volume
description: Razorpay ka end-of-day settlement engine har round me top 2 largest pending volumes uthata hai aur unhe net karta hai: agar dono equal hain toh dono cancel ho jaate hain (settled), nahi toh smaller wala settle ho jaata hai aur larger ki bachi hui difference vapas pool me chali jaati hai. Saare rounds chalne ke baad pool me at most ek hi value bachti hai (ya kuch bhi nahi → 0). Initial `volumes` array diya hai, final remaining volume return kar.
hints: Max-heap rakh — har baar top 2 nikaal.
Difference > 0 ho toh wapas push kar de.
Loop tab tak chalao jab heap size >= 2 ho. End me 0 ya top return kar.

title: Zomato Kth Fastest Delivery
description: Zomato ke ops dashboard pe Kth fastest delivery time chahiye (smallest k-th value). Tujhe `times` array (delivery minutes) aur `k` diya hai. Sorted ascending order me k-th smallest return kar (1-indexed). Duplicates alag count.
hints: Max-heap of size k rakh — top largest of k smallest = answer.
Push current; size > k toh pop.
End: heap top hi answer.

title: Ola Cable Joining Minimum Cost
description: Ola ke fleet ops me charging cables ke pieces hain. Do pieces ko jodne ka cost = un dono ki sum of lengths. Saare pieces ek single cable banane hain. Total minimum cost return kar.
hints: Greedy: smallest do hamesha pehle jodo — Huffman style.
Min-heap se min do nikalo, sum push karo, cost add.
Single piece ka cost 0.

title: Dunzo K Closest Dark Stores
description: Dunzo ke routing engine ko nearest `k` dark stores chahiye (origin = customer at (0,0)). Tujhe `points` 2D array `[[x,y],...]` aur `k` diya hai. Wo k points return kar jo origin se nearest hain (Euclidean distance). Order matter nahi karta — tujhe array of [x,y] return karna hai sorted by distance ascending; equal-distance ke case me x ascending, fir y ascending.
hints: Distance² use kar — sqrt avoid.
Max-heap of size k, har point push, size > k toh pop.
End me heap me k closest. Sort kar dist asc, fir x, fir y.

title: PhonePe Top K Merchant Volumes
description: PhonePe analytics ko `k` merchants chahiye jinki transaction count sabse zyada hai. Tujhe `merchants` array (merchant IDs as integers, repeats allowed) aur `k` diya hai. Top k IDs return kar count descending order me; tie pe smaller ID pehle.

examples.explanation: Tie at count 2; smaller id first.

hints: Frequency count nikal Map me.
Min-heap of size k ordered by (count asc, id desc) — agar size > k toh pop bottom.
End me heap drain karke reverse / sort by (count desc, id asc).

title: Flipkart Merge K Sorted Price Feeds
description: Flipkart ke seller portal pe `k` price feeds aate hain — har feed ek sorted ascending list of prices hai. In sab ko merge karke single sorted list banani hai. Tujhe `feeds` (2D array of integers, har inner array sorted asc) diya hai. Single sorted ascending array return kar.
constraints: Each inner array is sorted ascending
hints: Min-heap of (value, listIndex, elemIndex) — initialize with first elem of each feed.
Pop smallest, push next from same feed.
Empty inner arrays skip kar.

title: BookMyShow Minimum Screens Required
description: BookMyShow ke ek multiplex me different shows ke `[start, end]` time intervals (minutes from midnight) diye hain. Minimum kitne screens chahiye taaki sab shows simultaneously chal sake (overlap = same minute par dono running)? End time exclusive maano: ek show jo `end=120` pe khatam hota hai, doosre show jo `start=120` pe shuru hota hai, dono same screen pe possible.

examples.explanation: Show 1 [0,30) overlaps with both others; need 2 screens.

hints: Sort by start time.
Min-heap of currently-running ends.
Har naya show: agar uska start >= heap top end, pop (room reuse). Push new end. Heap size = answer.

title: Hotstar Reorganize Banner Sequence
description: Hotstar ke homepage banner rotation me lagataar same category ke shows nahi dikhane chahiye. Tujhe ek string `s` di hai jisme har character ek category dikhata hai (lowercase). String ko reorganize kar taaki adjacent characters never equal ho. Possible nahi ho toh empty string return kar. Multiple valid outputs ho sakte — kisi bhi ek ko return karna hota hai but tests me hum lexicographically smallest valid arrangement check karenge.
constraints: s consists of lowercase letters only
hints: Most frequent char count > (n+1)/2 toh impossible.
Max-heap by frequency. Pop top, append, decrement; pehle isko 'parking' me rakh, doosra pop kar, append, decrement, fir parking ko wapas push.
Tie pe lex-smallest: max-heap me freq desc, char asc se compare kar.

title: Paytm Live Transaction Median
description: Paytm ke fraud team ko live transaction stream ka running median chahiye. Tujhe operations ka 2D array diya hai. Har operation ya toh `["addNum", x]` (stream me x add karo, return null) ya `["findMedian"]` (current median return karo as a number). Median = sorted middle ka element odd count me, ya middle two ka average even me. Result array return kar har op ke liye (addNum ke liye null, findMedian ke liye number; even count me float allowed, odd integer).
constraints: findMedian sirf non-empty stream pe call hoga
hints: Two-heap pattern: max-heap (lower half) + min-heap (upper half).
Invariant: lower.size = upper.size ya lower.size = upper.size + 1.
Add: pehle lower me, fir balance — agar lower top > upper top, swap. Size mismatch fix.
Median: odd → lower.peek(); even → (lower.peek() + upper.peek()) / 2.

title: Myntra Kth Largest Sale Stream
description: Myntra ke sale dashboard ko har naya order add hone ke baad ab tak ka `k`th largest order value chahiye (1-indexed). Tujhe `k`, ek initial `seed` array, aur fir `add` operations ki sequence diya hai (as ops array). Har op `["add", x]` hai — return current kth largest after that add. Agar abhi tak total elements < k hain, `null` return kar us op ke liye. Result array return kar (har op ke liye ek entry).

examples.explanation: Run k=3 largest after each add.

hints: Min-heap of size k. Seed insert kar — size > k toh pop.
Har add: push, size > k toh pop. Agar size == k, peek = answer; else null.
Yeh classic 'KthLargest' design pattern hai but ops-array driven.

title: Uber Driver Task Scheduler Cooldown
description: Uber ke driver app me alag-alag categories ke `tasks` (string array of single chars) chalu hote hain. Same category ke do tasks ke beech `n` units ka cooldown chahiye (idle units allowed). Total minimum units chahiye saare tasks complete karne ke liye? Order kuch bhi rakh sakta hai.

examples.explanation: A B idle A B idle A B → 8 units.

hints: Greedy: highest-frequency category ko jab bhi possible execute kar.
Max-heap of remaining counts + queue of (count, readyTime) cooldown me.
Time tick karte raho — heap empty + queue empty hone tak.

title: Amazon Last Cargo Box Weight
description: Amazon warehouse me cargo boxes ka weight smashing process: do heaviest boxes uthao, agar same weight hai toh dono destroy ho jaate hain; nahi toh smaller destroy hota hai aur larger ka diff bach jaata hai. Yeh repeat tab tak jab tak ek ya zero box bache. Initial `weights` array diya hai. Final remaining box weight (ya 0 if none) return kar.
hints: Max-heap, top 2 nikalo, diff push.
Loop till size <= 1.
Empty hua toh 0 return.

title: Swiggy Smallest Rating Range Across Cuisines
description: Swiggy ke `k` cuisines hain, har ek ke ratings sorted ascending diye hain (`lists` 2D array). Tujhe smallest range `[a, b]` chahiye jo har cuisine ka kam se kam ek rating cover kare. Agar multiple ranges with same length hain, smallest `a` wala return kar; agar `a` bhi tie ho toh smallest `b` (auto). Output 2-element array `[a, b]`.
hints: Min-heap with one elem per list initially. Track current max.
Pop min, range = [min, max]. Update best.
Push next from same list; new max = max(currentMax, pushed). Stop when koi list khatam ho jaaye.

title: Razorpay Merge K Payment Streams Top N
description: Razorpay ke ledger me `k` payment streams hain, har ek sorted ascending by amount (could be empty). Tujhe top `n` smallest amounts merge karke return karne hain (sorted ascending). Agar total elements `< n` hain, jitne hain saare return kar. Tujhe `streams` (2D array) aur `n` integer diye hain.
hints: Standard k-way merge but stop after n elements.
Min-heap of (val, listIdx, elemIdx).
n se zyada total elements ho ya na ho — early break.
